mapper.select: SELECT tc.id, tcl.full_name AS fullName, tcl.phone, u1.name AS ownerName, tp.name AS productName, tc.description, tc.next_contact_time AS nextContactTime, tc.create_time AS createTime, u2.name AS createBy, tc.edit_time AS editTime, u3.name AS editBy FROM t_customer tc LEFT JOIN t_clue tcl ON tc.clue_id = tcl.id LEFT JOIN t_user u1 ON tcl.owner_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN t_product tp ON tc.product = tp.id LEFT JOIN t_user u2 ON tc.create_by = u2.id LEFT JOIN t_user u3 ON tc.edit_by = u3.id WHERE tc.id = #{id}
